rulings.Case Title: DONALD PIPKINS ET AL VS. LARRY D. ODBERT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 16, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANT STEVEN MATULICH's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED without leave to amend as to Lorna Pipkins. No opposition filed. Hearing required to address what specific factual allegations Donald Pipkins may make re: assertion that Thurman note was paid fully (FAC 13:17).= (501/NJL)
rulings.Judge: Judge Pro Tem: Noah J. Lebowitz

rulings.Case Title: U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, AS TRUSTEE FOR VS. DENISE BEATTY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication For Unlawful Detainer
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 16, 2017 line 4. PLAINTIFF U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication For Unlawful Detainer GRANTED. Moving party shifted its burden and Defendant failed to create a triable issue of fact with competent admissible evidence.= (501/NJL)
rulings.Judge: Judge Pro Tem: Noah J. Lebowitz

rulings.Case Title: CHOO KOON NG VS. DAMIEN QUINN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 16, 2017 line 5. PLAINTIFF CHOO NG's Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint OFF CALENDAR. The purported amended complaint is for a consolidated action CUD-15-653867 and CUD-15-653869. No order consolidating actions on file. Per December 22, 2016 Plaintiff was to present a proposed order for execution to the Court re: Consolidation. No such order has been submitted.= (501/NJL)
rulings.Judge: Judge Pro Tem: Noah J. Lebowitz
